items.question: Are all fire extinguishers accessible and in date?
Are emergency exits clear and unobstructed?
Is all PPE available and in good condition?
Are power tools inspected before use?
Is the work area free of trip hazards?
Are hazardous materials properly labelled and stored?
Is first aid kit fully stocked?
Are all guards and safety devices in place on machinery?
Are welding screens and curtains in place?
Is ventilation adequate in welding areas?
Are gas cylinders secured upright and capped when not in use?
Is all electrical equipment in good condition (no frayed cables)?
Are grinding and cutting areas free of combustibles?
Is hearing protection available and being used?
Are all MSDS/SDS sheets accessible for chemicals in use?
Are walkways and aisles clear?
Is lighting adequate throughout the facility?
Are waste disposal areas tidy and correctly labelled?
Are safety notices and signage visible and legible?
Is the accident register up to date?
Are all employees wearing required PPE for their area?
